metadata.title: DeepQuest | AI Technical Interview Coaching - Resume-Based Mock Interview
metadata.description: DeepQuest is an AI-powered technical interview coaching platform. Generate expected technical interview questions from your resume. AI mock interviews for developers to master your next tech interview.
metadata.keywords: DeepQuest, deep quest, technical interview, tech interview, AI technical interview, technical interview expected questions, tech interview questions, interview expected questions, developer interview questions, resume-based interview, personalized interview, mock interview, AI mock interview, AI mock interview for developers, developer job change, developer technical interview, DeepQuest technical interview, DeepQuest mock interview

steps.title: Upload your resume
steps.description: AI systematically organizes your experience by company and project. Tech stack, role, and duration are automatically structured.

steps.title: Uncover key achievements
steps.description: Extract STAR-based key achievements from each experience. Organized into Situation → Action → Result → Lesson structure for immediate interview use.

steps.title: 4 perspectives interviewers really care about
steps.description: Generate questions that could actually come from your experience, based on the core perspectives interviewers validate in tech interviews.

steps.title: Answer and get feedback
steps.description: Answer questions and AI analyzes your strengths and areas for improvement. Compare with model answers and fill in the gaps.

cta.headline: Now, discover that method
cta.subheadline: Stop getting stuck in tech interviews.
cta.reassurance: Get your first analysis results in just 2 minutes
